data.title: Tickets branch has merge conflict on fresh Claude Code web session start
data.description: Starting a new session in Claude Code web and attempting to use the ticket system (e.g., ticket create) fails with 'error: Committing is not possible because you have unmerged files' due to an unresolved rebase conflict on the tickets orphan branch. The .tickets-tracker worktree had an interactive rebase in progress with a both-added conflict on .gitignore. Users should not need to manually resolve ticket branch conflicts just to use the ticket system in a fresh session. The ticket system init or session startup should detect and resolve (or abort) stale rebase state on the tickets branch.
